entries.title: Scanner-only scoring bug
entries.description: severity_counts/category_counts not in ScannerOutput model. Fixed: computed from findings list via compute_scan_stats().

entries.title: Scanner crash bypass
entries.description: Pipeline scanner failure now sets injection_patterns_count=1 (fail-safe instead of silent pass).

entries.title: D1 risk floor
entries.description: Risk upgrade on critical findings now covers LOW/MEDIUM, not just INFO.

entries.title: dangerous_calls → MEDIUM risk
entries.description: dangerous_calls findings no longer set risk=HIGH. CRITICAL only from injection/obfuscation. Removed 50% false fail rate.

entries.title: Scanner penalty cap at 40
entries.description: Scanner penalty capped at 40 points. Previously uncapped, large repos could get penalty of 1952+ crushing score to 0.

entries.title: markdown_injection false positive
entries.description: Pattern matched data: ANYWHERE in URL. Fixed: only matches when protocol is at URL start. Shields.io badges were triggering.

entries.title: Obfuscation split HIGH_RISK/LOW_RISK
entries.description: Only high-risk patterns (rot13, marshal, chr concat) trigger safety override. Low-risk (hex_escape, base64 in tests) don't block pass.

entries.title: hidden_instruction narrowed
entries.description: Requires specific injection keywords (SYSTEM:, IGNORE, OVERRIDE, INSTRUCTION:).

entries.title: jailbreak pattern narrowed
entries.description: Only JAILBREAK and DAN MODE. Removed DEVELOPER MODE (too broad).

entries.title: act_as/pretend_to_be context requirement
entries.description: Requires jailbreak context words (DAN, unrestricted, etc.).

entries.title: JSON files excluded from obfuscation
entries.description: JSON files are data, not code — exclude from obfuscation scanning.

entries.title: Clone cleanup context managers
entries.description: All clone operations use context managers (TemporaryDirectory or CloneContext). No orphan clones.

entries.title: skill_id regex validation
entries.description: skill_id validated with ^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$ in both verify_one_skill() and fail_skill().

entries.title: Scanner FP fixes batch 1
entries.description: Superseded by vm-c-017 which consolidates all Run 3 scanner fixes.

entries.title: Scanner FP fixes batch 2
entries.description: Superseded by vm-c-017 which consolidates all Run 3 scanner fixes.

entries.title: Run 3 consolidated scanner fixes
entries.description: 7 fixes: unicode_escape_seq threshold 3→6, override_role context, roleplay_escape trailing, Cat 9 security detector skip, Cat 10 webpack chunk skip, protobuf _pb2.py skip, 4 new PM_VERIFIED_ORGS.

entries.title: Auto-clear hard-block on obf_hr caused 100% FP fail rate
entries.description: auto_clear_known_fp() had unconditional hard-block: if obf_hr > 0 return None. This meant every skill with even 1 hex_escape or unicode_escape in bundled JS/CJK text was stuck at fail. Fix: distinguish truly dangerous obfuscation (rot13, marshal, chr_concat) from noise (hex/unicode escapes). Added Cat 2 (obf FP without dangerous patterns), Cat 3 (large-repo obf), Cat 12 (injection-only without dangerous obf). Only block auto-clear when BOTH dangerous_obf AND injection are present.

entries.title: Pass threshold lowered from 80 to 70
entries.description: Pass required score >= 80, but legitimate MCP servers with documented capabilities (network, file, env access) scored 70-79 due to expected deductions. PM had overridden 76+ such skills. Threshold lowered to >= 70 for non-critical risk.
